title: Per-Transaction MEV Classification Execution
why_now: This slice established structural feasibility of four MEV types from trace data. Executing actual GROUP BY and pattern-matching queries against the parquet data would produce ground-truth counts and validate the estimated frequency ranges (2-5% arbitrage, 1-3% sandwich, <1% liquidation).

title: Trace-Log Correlation for Token MEV
why_now: This slice identified token-denominated MEV as the primary data gap — trace value fields only capture ETH flows. Joining canonical_execution_traces with canonical_execution_logs (Transfer events) would extend classification to ERC-20 arbitrage and sandwich attacks.

title: MEV Type Distribution Across Market Regimes
why_now: This slice used a single 700-block window around block 20,000,000. MEV composition likely shifts with gas price regime and market volatility. Multi-window sampling across different eras would reveal whether the taxonomy distribution is stable or regime-dependent.
